title: cleistes elongata
intro: Cleistes elongata, also known as the tube orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Cleistes elongata has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea or used in tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal usage.
